title: Soak Test - No Headset connected, app in the foreground, phone idle
scenario: Soak test: App remains stable and usable after prolonged idle foreground use with no headset connected
steps: Go to the home screen (no headset connected)
Leave the phone idle with the app in the foreground
Check that the app is still running and usable
expected: App remains running and usable after prolonged idle time with no crashes or memory leaks.
